subject: A figure in light blue and grey clothing is pinned against a sofa or chaise in a dim room, a golden gauntlet or bracer wrapped around their mouth, their arm stretched wide in distress
description: A humanoid figure is pressed back against what appears to be a dark purple upholstered sofa or chaise, one arm outstretched against the frame, the other raising a gold-plated forearm bracer or gauntlet to their lower face. Their head is tilted upward toward a dim window that shows a blue night sky. The room has patterned wallpaper and additional windows visible through an open doorway. The composition is low and close, emphasizing the figure's trapped, helpless posture. The palette blends indigo, grey, and dim amber. Body language clearly reads as distress and restraint.
foreground: dark purple upholstered furniture, figure in distress
background: patterned wallpaper, blue night windows, open doorway
